core_philosophy: Color is Function Only. 95% of the UI should be monochrome. Color exists only to guide action or flag bias severity. Truth, objective analysis, and authority are the primary emotional drivers.

typography.instructions: Avoid Inter for headings. Use fluid typography.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Containers with borders MUST have p-6 or p-8 padding.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B: 'Control Room' Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.landing_grid: MODE A: 'Tetris' Grid. Asymmetrical layouts with negative space.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use border-collapse and 1px solid borders. No soft drop shadows. If shadow is needed, use sharp brutalist shadow (e.g. shadow-[4px_4px_0_0_#09090B]) or no shadow at all. For dashboards, stick to flat solid white cards with zinc-200 borders.
spacing_and_layout.glassmorphism: Only for the sticky header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-zinc-200).

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Buttons should shift background color explicitly (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white). Metric cards should have slight lift (-translate-y-1) and border color darken to zinc-400.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease.
interactions_and_motion.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='upload-csv-button').

component_strategies.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm). High contrast. Primary CTA is solid Black or Klein Blue. Secondary CTA is outlined.
component_strategies.cards: Cardless or strictly rectangular flat cards with 1px border. No border-radius larger than 4px (rounded-sm).
component_strategies.forms: Use Shadcn UI Input/Select. Solid borders, clear focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black).
component_strategies.charts: Use Recharts (via Shadcn if possible). Stick to monochrome (blacks/grays) for normal data, and strictly red for the anomaly/bias line.
component_strategies.icons: Use lucide-react (already installed). Keep icon stroke width thin (1.5) for elegance.

landing_page.strategy: High visual impact. Black and white hero section with large fluid typography. Use a prominent bento grid for explaining 'Demographic Parity', 'Disparate Impact', etc.
landing_page.hero_image: Abstract minimalist architecture to represent 'structure' and 'truth'.

auth.strategy: Split layout. Left side: High-contrast abstract image or black panel with a striking quote about fairness. Right side: Minimalist login/signup form.

dashboard_list.strategy: Technical table view. Focus on data density. Use Shadcn Table component. Highlight failed audits in red.

upload_flow.strategy: Stepped process. Clean file dropzone. Clear column mapping UI. Use Shadcn Select for assigning 'Protected Attribute' and 'Outcome'.

analysis_results.strategy: The 'Control Room'. Top row: Big metric numbers in JetBrains Mono. Middle: Monochrome charts with red flags for bias. Bottom: Gemini AI explanation in a highlighted technical block (like a terminal or pure white clean box with Klein Blue border).
analysis_results.ai_explanation: Use a subtle 'Tracing Beam' or glowing border to highlight the AI-generated insights.

image_urls.description: White minimalist concrete architecture. Use as a subtle backdrop or hero side-image on the landing page to convey structure and objectivity.
White building with a clock. Symbolizes time/auditing. Use on the left side of the Auth split screen.
Black and white portrait of a woman. Use for AI Ethicist testimonial on landing page.
Black and white portrait of a man in hoodie. Use for Data Scientist testimonial.
